message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor "havenarbeider" as H
actor "douane en voedselinspectie" as D
actor "scheepsagent" as S

participant "Api gateway" as API
participant "kapiteinsdienst" as K
participant "administratie" as A
participant "containerbeheer en –transport" as C

box "per schip"
  S -> API : registerVessel
  API -> K : registerVessel
  K -> A : requestOffer
  A --> K : offerCreated
  A -> C : newContainerList

  opt "[deleteOffer]"
    D -> API : offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
    API -> K : offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
    K -> A : deleteOffer
  end

  D -> API : getDocuments
  API -> A : getDocuments
  A --> API
  API --> D
end box

box "per havenarbeider"
  H -> API : timeBadging
  API -> A : timeBadging

  H -> API : getPayCheck
  API -> A : getPayCheck
  A --> API
  API --> H
end box

@enduml
```
